name: Cost of Onsite Hearing Tests in Utah

mainEntity.name: What costs for onsite audiometric testing in South Salt Lake businesses?
mainEntity.text: What costs for onsite audiometric testing in South Salt Lake businesses?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically $20-50 per test via providers like Butterfield; full programs $5-15/employee annually including training, cheaper than offsite.

suggestedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake firms save with onsite services; Utah comp claims demand quality tests. Employers budget compliance to avoid liabilities. Workers benefit from accurate early detection. Compare vendors for compliance value.[3]

description: Typically $20-50 per test via providers like Butterfield; full programs $5-15/employee annually including training, cheaper than offsite.
